cleavage agent: the parameter used for data analysis included trypsin as the protease
collision energy: the MS/MS was acquired using higher-energy collision dissociation at 35% collision energy
fractionation method: we first used sucrose gradient fractionation to test circ-0000437 loading onto polysomes
fragmentation method: the MS/MS was acquired using higher-energy collision dissociation
instrument: the peptide samples were analyzed on Thermo Fisher LTQ Obitrap ETD mass spectrometry
labeling: the peptide samples were analyzed on Thermo Fisher LTQ Obitrap ETD mass spectrometry
